name: Ashley Phillips
body: So happy to see her enjoying school and friends. ♥ I wish I could see her baptism this weekend! What a glorious moment it will be!

name: Julie Hickman
body: So glad to see Lyla back in school. Love all the notes of wonderful progress. And “that’s right… God is definitely not through with her yet!”

name: sus smith
body: We have been following and praying and rejoicing and crying with you all. We are family somewhat removed, yet whether you know us or not, we know you . Love and ((((hugs)))) Susan and Larry Smith from the Shepard side of the family in Indiana

name: Kathy Laub
body: Its just wonderful to hear all this news! My husband told me about your visit to Newille on Sunday. He said it was just glorious to have you there! I was bummed that I had to miss it! Hopefully I will get to meet up with you another time soon. This coming weekend we will be seeing Lydie our friend from Haiti who has been praying for Lyla and we are looking forward to sharing all these recent installments of God's handiwork! Thank you so much for these updates!

name: Mills Nicole
body: Hugs from Ms. Nicole. Lyla and so happy to hear that you are doing good and back to school. I know everyone has missed you.

name: Tina Hurst
body: I don’t have much to say except there are no words. I’m in awe of what God is doing with, for and through your family! Can’t wait to see Lyla’s baptism!
